title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
